notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Blas Castaño picks off Corbin Carroll at 1st on throw to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Blas Castaño on the pickoff attempt. Ildemaro Vargas out at 3rd on the throw, right fielder Tyler Freeman to third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Jake McCarthy out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Troy Johnston out at 2nd. Ezequiel Tovar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Chad Stevens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chad Stevens out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Jorge Barrosa. Jake McCarthy scores.
